data.plain_cv_summary: The submitted CV documents 7 years of backend engineering experience with documented exposure to Python, Django, FastAPI, and microservices architecture. A quantified team leadership contribution (4 engineers) and a measured delivery improvement (60% reduction in deployment time via CI/CD pipeline) are present in the record. AWS Solutions Architect certification (2023) is on file. The record does not document postgraduate qualifications or formal management training. Education history ends at BSc in Computer Science from the University of Amsterdam (year not stated) with no continuing education documented since graduation.
evidence_snippets: Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time by 60%
